decisions.rationale: Observation already resolves to its own base_record_id entity_mta-nyct, which exists in the registry as 'MTA NYCT Reference' (entity_type: agency). The block text 'New York City Transit' on page 1 matches the registry's entity_name 'MTA New York City Transit'. Per rule, when the closest match is the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is new — the observation confirms the existing identity.

Observation already resolves to its own base_record_id entity_nyc-dot, which exists in the registry as 'NYC DOT as Publisher' (entity_type: agency). The block text 'NEW YORK CITY DOT' on page 13 matches the registry's entity_name 'New York City Department of Transportation'. Per rule, when the closest match is the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is new.
